actions.description: Created 2026-05-29 changelog with third board meeting entry.
First weekly project status report covering all 8 cycles since inception. Tracks 4 games live, flags mobile touch overdue and empty R&D pipeline.

nextStep: Validate all game meta.json files for schema compliance. Update report after CEO's first inspection.
complianceNotes: Changelog current through 01:00Z. All standards published. README accurate.
